questions.question: What is a quadrilateral?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral is a polygon that has four sides, four vertices and four angles.

questions.question: How many sides does a quadrilateral have?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral has four sides.

questions.question: How many vertices does a quadrilateral have?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral has four vertices.

questions.question: What is the sum of the interior angles of a quadrilateral?
questions.answer: The sum of the interior angles of a quadrilateral is 360°.

questions.question: How many diagonals does a quadrilateral have?
questions.answer: A quadrilateral has two diagonals.

questions.question: Define a parallelogram.
questions.answer: A parallelogram is a quadrilateral in which opposite sides are parallel.

questions.question: What is a rectangle?
questions.answer: A rectangle is a quadrilateral with four right angles.

questions.question: What is a square?
questions.answer: A square is a quadrilateral with all sides equal and all angles equal to 90°.

questions.question: What is a rhombus?
questions.answer: A rhombus is a quadrilateral in which all sides are equal.

questions.question: What is a trapezium?
questions.answer: A trapezium is a quadrilateral with one pair of parallel sides.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, how are opposite sides?
questions.answer: Opposite sides of a parallelogram are equal and parallel.

questions.question: In a parallelogram, how are opposite angles?
questions.answer: Opposite angles of a parallelogram are equal.

questions.question: What happens to the diagonals of a parallelogram?
questions.answer: The diagonals of a parallelogram bisect each other.

questions.question: What is the measure of each angle in a rectangle?
questions.answer: Each angle of a rectangle measures 90°.

questions.question: What is the special property of the sides of a rhombus?
questions.answer: All sides of a rhombus are equal.

questions.question: How many pairs of parallel sides does a parallelogram have?
questions.answer: A parallelogram has two pairs of parallel sides.

questions.question: What is a diagonal?
questions.answer: A diagonal is a line segment joining two opposite vertices of a polygon.

questions.question: How many right angles are present in a square?
questions.answer: A square has four right angles.

questions.question: Name a quadrilateral with all sides equal.
questions.answer: A rhombus or square.

questions.question: Name a quadrilateral with four right angles.
questions.answer: A rectangle or square.

questions.question: What is the sum of opposite angles in a parallelogram?
questions.answer: Opposite angles are equal in a parallelogram.

questions.question: What happens to adjacent angles in a parallelogram?
questions.answer: Adjacent angles in a parallelogram are supplementary.

questions.question: Name a quadrilateral with only one pair of parallel sides.
questions.answer: Trapezium.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has equal diagonals?
questions.answer: Rectangle and square have equal diagonals.

questions.question: Which quadrilateral has diagonals that bisect each other?
questions.answer: Parallelogram.
